result_note: This artifact defines the test plan. Tests will be written BEFORE implementation per PICA extraction rules.

scenario_1_confirm_path.name: Single-cluster happy path — Fed rate hike with 5 headlines
scenario_1_confirm_path.description: Given 5 headlines about a Fed rate hike from different sources (Reuters, Bloomberg, WSJ, CNBC, FT), the three-tier pipeline should produce exactly 1 named cluster with theme 'Fed Rate Hike' and all 5 articles grouped.

headlines.headline: Fed Raises Rates 25bp, Signals More to Come
Federal Reserve Hikes Interest Rates to Combat Inflation
Fed Raises Benchmark Rate by Quarter Point
US Central Bank Moves Rates Higher as Expected
Federal Reserve Tightens Policy with 25bp Rate Increase

scenario_2_observe_path.name: Noise filtering — 3 unrelated headlines should produce 0 clusters
scenario_2_observe_path.description: Given 3 headlines on completely unrelated topics (tech IPO, sports, weather), the pipeline should classify all as noise (no clusters formed).

headlines.headline: New AI Startup Raises $50M in Series A
Lakers Win Championship in Game 7 Thriller
Hurricane Warning Issued for Florida Coast

scenario_3_question_path.name: Mixed cluster + noise — 2 related topics + 1 unrelated
scenario_3_question_path.description: Given 8 headlines: 5 about oil prices rising, 3 about tech layoffs. Pipeline should produce 2 clusters ('Oil Price Surge', 'Tech Layoffs') and no noise.

headlines.headline: Crude Oil Surges Past $85 on Supply Concerns
Oil Prices Jump as OPEC+ Extends Production Cuts
WTI Crude Crosses $85 for First Time Since 2025
Energy Sector Rallies on Higher Oil Prices
Google Lays Off 12,000 Employees in Restructuring
Big Tech Layoffs Continue as Google Cuts Workforce
Silicon Valley Job Cuts Accelerate in Q2

pipeline/entity_extractor.py.rationale: Regex-only, no API calls, pure Python string processing. No external dependencies.

pipeline/event_clusterer.py.rationale: New pipeline stage; HDBSCAN clustering; Flash API calls for theme synthesis; modifies investigation loop input.

pipeline/flash_triage.py (modified).rationale: Modifies Stage 2 output schema; TriageResult already consumed by investigation_loop. Schema change requires backward compat check.
